reviews.review_description:
A bit strange and random but very fun!  My daughter is obsessed with petting all of the animals and throwing the ball over the walls. 

Definitely worth a download to wander around and explore. The capture-the-eagles game was a great addition.

I <3 the zoo and this game gave me a lovely day at the zoo experience.  The animals looked surprisingly real and lots o animals to see. Def recommend this for anyone wanting to play a zoo game or rest at the zoo
High quality animals for a Quest environment in my opinion and the kind of game you could let a new Vr player wonder around in

I used to be a broken man, my wife had left me, my children were gone, and i was on the brink of ending it all. Then, a man on reddit approached me and gave me a key to ZOSU Zoo, i learned later that this was Mr. ZOSU Himself, maybe even the Holy Spirit. I played for hours on end, even got into the ZOSU Zoo speedrunning community, and i currently hold the record for Eagle%. It is a overall life changing experience and i feel like world peace would be attained if we gave everyone an oculus quest 2 and a key to ZOSU Zoo.

Found out about this game from a dev post on the Oculus Quest 2 subreddit. Animals are changing and the Eagles are near to catch. I enjoyed going underwater and playing with the fish and then sprinting away to catch another eagle.

I highly recommend this for young kids who are interested in animals.

Hi am so surprised how relaxing and enjoyable..bought it mainly for my grandson to look at the animals etc.  the whole layout  andthe animals and other creatures are really well done.  Great work guys
